kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Highrow and Southgate, one goes with Aldric and the other with Matilda.

Highrow, Millpond, and Oldwall go with Blacksmith, Tanner, and 10 coins, in some order.

Potter does not go with Matilda if and only if Riverside does not go with Weaver.
